title: Harmonograph Lab
description: A multi-source generative-art studio: layer harmonographs, spirographs, roses, Lissajous, superformula, eight 2D strange attractors, FOURTEEN real 3D strange attractors (Lorenz, Rössler, Aizawa, Thomas, Halvorsen, Chen, Dadras, Sprott, Lorenz-84, Sprott-B, Nosé–Hoover, Rikitake, Chen–Lee, Burke–Shaw), a 3D HARMONOGRAPH (a spatial pendulum tracing a knotted 3-D Lissajous figure) & L-system fractals (incl. branching plants) with color/blend/glow/kaleidoscope. Fly every 3-D family through one orbit camera — drag to rotate, scroll/pinch to dolly — and view it in genuine STEREOSCOPIC 3D (red-cyan anaglyph or side-by-side / cross-eye). Render as luminous DENSITY-FIELD nebulae (millions of points splatted into a tone-mapped histogram, with depth-cued volumetric color + depth fog), spin them live, pulse and beat-reseed to your mic, and export seamless looping GIF/WebM (from-scratch GIF encoder) or high-res PNG/SVG. Shareable by URL.
